title: Extension of Generalist Member to the Senior Salaries Review Body
body: "Pippa Greenslade has had her term extended as Generalist Member of the Senior Salaries Review Body until 1 June 2026.  Pippa’s term was due to end 1st June 2025, but has been extended for continuity of board expertise.  The Senior Salaries Review Body is an independent pay review body which provides advice to the Government on a number of senior public sector workforces.  Read more about the Senior Salaries Review Body here.  The Governance Code for Public Appointments sets out that no individual should serve in a single role for more than two terms or ten years.  Pippa brings a wealth of experience, she was previously Group Human Resources Director of Bakkavor plc, a global provider of fresh prepared foods from 2013-2018, Global Human Resources Director at the British Council and held senior HR positions within Cadbury plc. "
